reviews.comment:
Es bastante seguro y cómodo para acampar de paso, tiene buenas sombras, asadores , mesas con sillas de material para comer en flia al aire libre, buenas instalaciones de baños,duchas y bar...

(Translated by Google)
It's quite safe and comfortable for camping while passing through, it has good shade, grills, tables with chairs for family meals outdoors, good bathroom facilities, showers and a bar...

reviews.comment:
Un desastre! Desorganizada la playa para cargar combustible y el kiosco no tenía ni sanguches para ofrecer. Es la peor YPF con ACA que pisé en mí vida. Muy limitado el autoservicio

(Translated by Google)
A disaster! The fuel area was disorganized, and the kiosk didn't even have sandwiches to offer. It's the worst YPF with ACA I've ever been to. The self-service area is very limited.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención baños más que impresionantes de limpios lo único el wifi malísimo y la señal de personal no anda ósea malabares tuve que hacer para pagar recomiendo llevar efectivo

(Translated by Google)
Great service, the bathrooms were incredibly clean, the only downside was the terrible Wi-Fi and the phone signal was practically nonexistent—I had to jump through hoops to pay. I recommend bringing cash.
